description_long: This is a modern bungalow complex surrounded by a dark boundary wall, featuring multiple interconnected single-story structures with flat and slightly sloped green roofs. The property includes landscaped gardens with a variety of trees and shrubs, as well as paved walkways and open courtyards. The main building has large window openings and a prominent entryway, while secondary structures are arranged around the central garden space. The exterior is predominantly white with green roof accents, and the layout suggests a focus on outdoor living and privacy. The grounds are spacious, with clear separations between living areas and auxiliary buildings. The overall design is clean, geometric, and emphasizes integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow complex with flat green roofs, white facades, and landscaped gardens enclosed by a dark boundary wall.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main building with its green roof, adjacent gardens, and the boundary wall enclosing the property, highlighting the layered landscaping and tree clusters.
description_view_1: View 1 emphasizes the rear and side of the bungalow, revealing the arrangement of secondary structures and the open courtyard with more visible greenery.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the front facade with the main entrance, large windows, and a clear view of the central garden and auxiliary buildings.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side, focusing on the back of the main building, the sloped roof sections, and the separation between the main and secondary structures.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
